text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Whoa, whoa, whoa? What are you up to in that
corner all by yourself?

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Hmm. Looks like something to me, though.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Oh, do you want to play tag with those kids over
there?

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Got it! Well, why don't you come with me? We
can go ask them together!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Heya-hey, guys! Can we play tag too?

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Thanks! Okay, I'll be "it" first! You guys better
run!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: I'm gonna getcha! You can't outrun me!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Phew, I got pretty into that.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Wait, that's the time?! I completely forgot about training!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Having lost track of time, Ines Fujin ends up
skipping her training session.
